title: Event
description: A public event hosted or convened by the Queens Borough President — Land Use Public Hearings, Borough Board and Borough Cabinet meetings, town halls, expos, and webinars. Announced as HTML pages on queensbp.nyc.gov (e.g. the Newsroom); there is NO structured events feed or Open Data twin. Note: the WordPress REST API (wp/v2) is enabled on the site but exposes 0 posts and 0 'project' entries — events are authored as Divi page-builder pages, not as structured content the API returns.

location.description: Physical location (e.g. Queens Borough Hall) or 'Virtual (Zoom)'.

virtual.description: Whether the event is held (or also offered) virtually.

registrationRequired.description: Whether pre-registration is required (e.g. to testify virtually at a hearing).
